job_title: Senior Analyst, Enterprise Analytics (Austin, TX - Based)
job_location: Austin, Texas, United States of America
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
must_have_quals: Minimum 3+ years of experience in data analytics, Expert proficiency in SQL, Advanced experience with BI tools (specifically Tableau or Looker), Foundational knowledge of Python or R for statistical modeling and data manipulation, Experience with dbt (data build tool) or similar ETL/ELT frameworks would be preferable, Hands-on experience using LLMs for prototyping & deployment, Strong ability to structure problems, perform deep-dive analysis, and synthesize large volumes of data into a cohesive narrative, Proven track record of presenting complex technical findings to non-technical audiences and influencing senior stakeholders
core_responsibilities: Act as a strategic partner to leadership in Operations, Sales, and Finance domains to identify business challenges and define data-driven solutions, Lead the design, development, and delivery of complex analytical projects, from initial data requirements gathering to final executive presentation, Create, maintain, and automate high-visibility dashboards in Tableau/Looker that track global KPIs and business health, Bring a forward thinking mindset to all your work to drive quality & velocity, Develop, optimize & deploy sophisticated SQL queries and dbt models, Apply statistical methods to identify trends, perform variance analysis, and build forecasting models to predict business outcomes, Provide technical guidance and peer reviews for junior analysts, ensuring best practices in SQL optimization and data storytelling
job_summary: Zendesk is a company that focuses on enhancing customer service experiences. They are seeking a Senior Analyst in their Enterprise Analytics team to deliver high-impact analytics that drive strategic decisions across business functions, translating complex datasets into actionable recommendations for leadership.
